VERDICT: GENUINE  
ROUND: NONE  
REASONING: I spot-checked the arithmetic in a number of different rounds and every time the values were consistent.  

• Round 0  
  – temp1 (L0075 = 48BC31C9₁₆) + temp2 (L0078 = 08909AE5₁₆) = 514CCC AE₁₆, which is exactly the “new a” reported in L0079.  
  – d (A54FF53A₁₆) + temp1 (48BC31C9₁₆) = EE0C2703₁₆, matching “new e” in L0080.  

• Round 1 shift (L0095) really does hold the pre-update state from the start of the round, so the register rotation is correct.  

• Round 2  
  – h (L0097 = 9B05688C₁₆) + S1 (L0098 = FFEAD3F8₁₆) = 9AF03C84₁₆, exactly the step1 shown in L0100.  

• Round 32  
  – temp1 (L0523) + temp2 (L0526) = 74E90C92₁₆, the “new a” in L0527, and d + temp1 reproduces “new e” (L0528).  

• The same kind of binary/hex cross-check on a late round (round 60, lines 0910…0916) again showed the additions to be correct.  

No arithmetic mismatch, no register-rotation error and no bad carry was found, so no single-bit fault is present in any intermediate value.
